LaunchRequest.description:
Launch body: a command path (e.g. ``"backtest run"``) + its remaining args, or a bare
``args`` string (empty ``command``) for the free-form console.
LaunchRequest.title: LaunchRequest

WorkspaceBody.description: A workspace to save: a display name, the linked context, and the Dockview layout.
WorkspaceBody.title: WorkspaceBody

get.description: Serve the built single-page workstation.

SSE: ``snapshot``, then ``run_added/run_updated`` + ``job_*`` diffs each poll tick.

``max_events`` bounds the stream for tests/diagnostics; browsers omit it and stream forever.
Point-in-time candles for ``symbol`` (``{symbol:path}`` so ``BTC/USD`` works).
The CLI command tree, each annotated with the run-type dir it writes (``None`` = no run).
All known jobs (live + this-session-finished), newest first.

schema.title: Response List Jobs Api Jobs Get

post.description: Launch ``alpha <command> <args>`` as a background job. Returns its id + initial status.

delete.description: Cancel a running job (idempotent no-op if already finished).

get.description: A single job's status + its buffered output lines (for a late-opening panel).
SSE of a job's output; a reconnect with ``Last-Event-ID`` replays only the missed lines.
Price + greeks across a spot range for the greeks-vs-spot chart.
Price + delta/gamma/vega/theta/rho for one European option.
The implied volatility that reprices the option to ``price`` (+ greeks at that vol).
Backtest each strategy on ``symbol`` and rank by total return (slow — runs the engine).
Vol-scaling + tail-shock scenarios for a run (422 if it has no equity curve).
Filtered, newest-first, paginated run index for the run browser.
Full manifest + kind/mtime + artifact-presence flags.
The run's equity curve as ``{ts, equity, drawdown}`` (empty lists when it wrote none).
A forecast run's history + forecast series (+ quantile bands). 404 otherwise.
The first ``n`` (clamped to 40) sampled close paths of a forecast run. 404 otherwise.
A gauntlet run's raw per-tier null distributions. 404 when it wrote none.
A forecast-eval run's per-origin skill scores, columnar. 404 when it wrote none.
A prop-firm run's per-path Monte-Carlo outcomes, columnar. 404 when it wrote none.
The run's rendered quantstats tear sheet (embedded in Run Detail via an iframe).
The run's trade-log rows (``[]`` when it wrote none).

schema.title: Response Run Trades Api Runs  Run Id  Trades Get

get.description: A sweep's per-config OOS return streams. 404 when it wrote none.
Recent company news for ``symbol`` (503 when unconfigured).
A live quote for ``symbol`` (503 when the finnhub key/network is missing).
Registered strategies + their tunable ``--param`` axes.
Every symbol with stored bars.
Every saved workspace (``{slug, name, updated}``).

schema.title: Response List Workspaces Api Workspaces Get

post.description: Save (upsert) a workspace under a slug derived from its name.

get.description: The full workspace document to restore.
Alias for the workstation (same SPA as ``/``).
